title: Simulator: Model gateway-centric mode
description:
Update Python simulator to model gateway-centric announce suppression.

## Files to modify
- python/src/lichen/sim/ (as needed)

## Changes
1. Simulated gateway advertises gateway-centric flag in DIO
2. Nodes track DODAG membership state
3. Announce interval scales based on DODAG state
4. Model transition: DODAG lost -> resume normal announces

## Testing
- Verify announce rate drops when nodes join DODAG
- Verify announce rate recovers when DODAG lost
- Measure channel utilization with/without gateway
